title: zingiber aurantiacum
intro: Zingiber aurantiacum, also known as the Chinese yellow ginger or yellow ginger, is a species of ginger native to China and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Zingiber aurantiacum include reducing nausea and vomiting, alleviating cold and flu symptoms, and supporting digestive health. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as in cooking and as a natural food coloring.
